warnings: This record describes a recommended path. EVL is the canonical owner of eval artifacts; no eval is adopted, scheduled, or run by MET.
Ordering of required steps is a recommendation, not a binding sequence; EVL may reorder.
failure_prevented: EVL bottleneck recurring loop after loop because there is no documented path from a MET-side eval candidate to an EVL-owned eval artifact.
signal_improved: Each MET eval candidate has a named, sourced path to materialization, including required authority inputs, required upstream artifacts, required tests, and a declared owner_recommendation.
required_authority_inputs: EVL acceptance of candidate eval shape and acceptance condition
GOV confirmation that the candidate type fits the EVL canonical eval taxonomy
TPA confirmation that downstream policy interpretation is unaffected (where the candidate touches policy inputs)
required_tests: EVL-owned schema test for the new eval artifact
REP/LIN dimension presence test (per-dimension status field)
Dashboard-truth test confirming /api/intelligence preserves source_artifacts_used and degrades missing fields to 'unknown'
next_recommended_input: Forward this record to EVL alongside `artifacts/dashboard_metrics/eval_candidate_record.json` for adoption review.
